nodes.summary: audit_source_tree_coverage must treat prune-glob-matched source files as covered
_validate_absent_files must use is_file() not exists() for path entries
_validate_absent_files must support glob-pattern and directory-prefix entries in source_only
Regression test fixture must cover directory entry, glob entry, and prune-glob coverage cases
Glob expansion must be bounded to repo root with no external process execution
stderr WARNING must continue for genuinely uncovered source files
Exact-file source_only entries must behave identically (backward compat)
Regression tests must run via pytest without k8s or external network
prune-glob-matched files not reported as uncovered; uncovered_source_files_count is 0
directory-prefix source_only entry does not trigger absent-file error
glob source_only entry emits error for each matching file in consumer
glob source_only entry with no matching file emits no error
exact-file source_only entry with file present emits error (backward compat)
